title: Front Office Manager - Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises!
